description: Still in Deke's office, Sarge reveals his deadly intent, admitting to pursuing Deke because he 'shouldn't be here.' Deke escapes and runs into Trevor, who discloses his status as a S.H.I.E.L.D. agent. Meanwhile, Sarge's team prepares to escalate the assault. The air grows more threatening as Deke realizes the full scope of the attack, and S.H.I.E.L.D. begins its tactical response.

transcript.line: Sorry. I guess I'm drawing a blank.
Man, you... you don't remember all the heroic stuff I did? That's... I guess Fitz didn't go easy on you.
Guess not.
How are they, anyway? I feel bad I didn't get a proper goodbye with the grandparents.
Slowing down, but still hanging in there.
What about Agent May? I mean, she wouldn't leave your side. Is she... Is she nearby somewhere?
Of course.
But what I'm... what I'm, like, dying to know is, how is Agent... Doug?
Well, you know, Doug's Doug.
Yeah, that is #Truth. Um, oh, I just forgot something. I'll be back in one minute.
You're a real talker, but you're not from here and you shouldn't be here, so I got to take you and make you sing.
Aah! Ahh...
A real hand. Not Coulson.
You know you're already dead, right?
That is a large, large man. Ray...
Stay back!
No! No, no, no, no, no! Ray! Ray!
Oh. Oh, okay.
Tracker says he's not from this world, but his signature's different from the others.
That's strange.
If you consider the infinite complexity of nature, maybe “strange” is the norm.
Strange or not, he's still a target.
Not just a target, a talker. You know what that means.
Kill him slow, make him bleed.
